CustomField.description: Secret salt prefixed to recipient IP before SHA-256 hashing. Stored on ULBC_Email_Event__c.ULBC_IP_Hash__c so historical IPs cannot be recovered (UK GDPR data minimisation), while same-day rate-limiting and forensic correlation remain possible. Rotate periodically — Phase v2 adds a scheduled rotation job. Treat as a secret: no permission set grants read.
CustomField.label: IP Hash Salt
